events.title: Ad Copy Review & Approval
events.description: Review and approve batch-001 ad copy across 5 angles: productivity, caffeine replacement, Dubai problem, identity, and science. Happy approves final variants before creative production handoff.

events.title: Creative Production (Nano Banana)
events.description: Nano Banana produces animated video clips and static image assets from all approved copy angles. Target output: 5 angles x 3 creative variants = 15 assets minimum. Ready for Meta upload.

events.title: Shopify Landing Pages A/B Test Setup
events.description: Build two Shopify landing page variants. Variant A: productivity angle headline. Variant B: Dubai problem angle headline. Full GA4 instrumentation — scroll depth, add-to-cart, conversion events. UTM tracking for each Meta ad set.

events.title: Meta Ads Go Live — Soft Launch
events.description: Dubai campaign goes live on Meta (Instagram + Facebook). Initial spend: test budget across 5 ad angles. Campaign structure: 5 ad sets (one per angle), 3 creative variants each. Monitor for 48h before touching anything.

events.title: Data Collection Period
events.description: Two-week data collection window. Daily review of: Meta Ads Manager (CTR, CPM, CPA per ad/creative), GA4 (scroll depth, time on page, add-to-cart rate), Shopify (conversion rate, revenue). Hans generates daily insights digest.

events.title: Week 1 Ads Review
events.description: First weekly review of Meta campaign performance. Key questions: Which angle has lowest CPA? Which creative has highest CTR? Which landing page variant has better conversion rate? Kill obvious losers, reallocate budget to winners.

events.title: Week 2 Ads Review
events.description: Second weekly review. Two weeks of data — enough to identify statistically meaningful trends. Document: winning angle, winning creative format, winning landing page variant, customer profile (who is actually clicking and buying).

events.title: Optimization Review — Pick Winning Creative
events.description: Strategic milestone: lock in winning ad angle and creative format. Scale winning ad set. Pause low performers. Commission next creative batch based on learnings. Update KRYO.md with validated avatar insights.

events.title: Full Dubai Market Push
events.description: Scale winning creative to full budget. Expand audience targeting based on buyer profile data. Retargeting campaign goes live for website visitors who didn't convert. Goal: 3x spend from soft launch phase.

events.title: Month 1 Revenue Milestone Review
events.description: End-of-month strategic review. Metrics: total revenue, ROAS, CPA, number of units sold, customer LTV signals. Decision point: continue Dubai scale-up, pivot angle, or begin expanding to second market. Document all learnings.

events.title: UAE Influencer Campaign Starts
events.description: Launch influencer activation with Dubai-based high-performers (biohackers, fitness founders, morning routine content creators). Target: 3-5 micro-influencers (50K-200K followers), performance-oriented audience, UAE-based. Provide KRYO units + commission structure.

events.title: Influencer Campaign Week 1 Review
events.description: Review first week of influencer content. Metrics: reach, engagement rate, affiliate link clicks, conversions. Identify best-performing influencer content to repurpose as paid ads. Collect UGC assets.

events.title: 6-Week Launch Strategy Review
events.description: Major strategic review at 6-week mark. Full audit of: paid media performance, landing page conversion rates, influencer ROI, customer feedback, product-market fit signals. Set targets for Month 2. Decide on geographic expansion timeline.

events.title: Second Market Decision Point
events.description: Decision: expand to second city (candidates: Riyadh, Abu Dhabi, Doha) or double down on Dubai. Criteria: Dubai ROAS > 3x, CPA < $200, at least 20 units sold. If criteria met, begin localization research for next market.

events.title: Q2 Campaign Planning
events.description: Plan Q2 (June-August) campaign strategy. Summer in Dubai = peak heat = peak relevance for KRYO. Develop summer campaign angles, refresh creative library, set Q2 revenue targets. Brief Hans on Q2 content generation priorities.
